name: bug-fix
prompt: The keyword-detector.sh script uses a pattern that would match 'ultrawork' anywhere in the prompt, including inside longer words. Add a word-boundary guard so 'ultrawork' only triggers when it appears as a standalone word or at a word boundary. Show the fix and verify it with a test.
success_criteria: The fix uses proper word-boundary matching (e.g., `(^|[^a-zA-Z])ultrawork([^a-zA-Z]|$)` or `\bultrawork\b` via grep -P) to prevent false positives on substrings. A manual test shows 'ultrawork' triggers but 'myultrawork' does not. Existing validate-plugin tests still pass.
